title: plectranthus dupuisii
intro: Plectranthus dupuisii, also known as the 'Blue Spur Flower', is a species of flowering plant native to Madagascar. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Plectranthus dupuisii include its ability to relieve coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
